output.answer: The club formed in 1957 is Canon Yaoundé, which was the team that played in the second round of the 1983 African Cup of Champions Clubs and scored most goals in the second leg.
output.formatted:
The club formed in 1957 is Canon Yaoundé, which was the team that played in the second round of the 1983 African Cup of Champions Clubs and scored most goals in the second leg.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?team ?goals ?foundationDate WHERE {
  wd:Q3341461 wdt:P177 ?edition .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1983-"))
  ?match wdt:P177 ?edition .
  ?match wdt:P1545 "Second round" .
  ?match wdt:P1691 "2" .
  {
    ?match wdt:P2602 ?team ; wdt:P1769 ?goals
  } UNION {
    ?match wdt:P2603 ?team ; wdt:P1770 ?goals
  }
  ?team wdt:P571 ?foundationDate
}
ORDER BY DESC(?goals)
LIMIT 1
```
